channel.title: MarketPulse - Financial Markets News
channel.description: Real-time financial market news covering stocks, commodities, ETFs, mutual funds, forex, and global economic impact

item.title: S&P 500 Hits All-Time High as Fed Signals Rate Cut in September
item.description: The S&P 500 surged to a record close after the Federal Reserve signaled a potential interest rate cut at its September meeting, boosting investor confidence across global markets.

item.title: Gold Prices Surge Past $2,400 as Geopolitical Tensions Escalate
item.description: Gold hit a new record high above $2,400 per ounce as investors sought safe-haven assets amid rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and Eastern Europe.

item.title: Nifty 50 Crosses 25,000 Mark for First Time on Strong FII Inflows
item.description: India's Nifty 50 index breached the historic 25,000 level driven by sustained foreign institutional investor inflows and strong domestic economic data.

item.title: Crude Oil Drops 5% as OPEC+ Considers Production Increase
item.description: Oil prices fell sharply after reports that OPEC+ members are considering unwinding production cuts earlier than expected, potentially adding significant supply to global markets.

item.title: Top Performing ETFs of Q2 2026: Tech and Healthcare Lead Gains
item.description: Technology and healthcare sector ETFs have delivered double-digit returns in Q2 2026, with AI-focused funds gaining over 30% year-to-date.

item.title: European Markets Rally on ECB Stimulus Hopes
item.description: European stocks closed higher with the STOXX 600 gaining 1.8% as traders priced in potential European Central Bank stimulus measures to support the Eurozone economy.

item.title: China's Industrial Profits Surge 12% Signaling Economic Recovery
item.description: China's industrial profits grew at the fastest pace in 18 months, suggesting that government stimulus measures are gaining traction in the world's second-largest economy.

item.title: Rupee Strengthens to 82.50 Against Dollar on FII Inflows
item.description: The Indian rupee appreciated to a three-month high against the US dollar as foreign portfolio investors continued to pour capital into Indian debt and equity markets.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Hit Record $2.8 Billion in Single Week
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their highest weekly inflow ever as institutional adoption accelerates following clearer regulatory guidelines from the SEC.

item.title: Japan's Nikkei 225 Rebounds as Semiconductor Stocks Rally
item.description: Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 recovered from early losses led by semiconductor stocks on renewed AI chip demand, with Tokyo Electron and Advantest gaining over 4%.

item.title: Best Large Cap Mutual Funds to Invest in for Long Term Growth
item.description: Analysis of top-performing large cap mutual funds with consistent 5-year track records, expense ratios, and fund manager insights for long-term investors.

item.title: ASX 200 Hits 6-Week High on Mining and Energy Rally
item.description: Australia's S&P/ASX 200 reached a six-week high as mining and energy stocks surged on rising commodity prices, with BHP and Rio Tinto leading gains.

item.title: Emerging Market Debt Funds See Strongest Inflows in 2 Years
item.description: Emerging market bond funds attracted their largest capital inflows in two years as investors search for yield in a lower interest rate environment.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Point to Higher Open Ahead of Jobs Report
item.description: US stock futures edged higher as traders awaited the monthly jobs report for clues on the labor market's health and its impact on Federal Reserve policy.

item.title: Hang Seng Index Rises as Tech Stocks Rebound on Policy Support
item.description: Hong Kong's Hang Seng Index gained over 2% as Chinese technology stocks rebounded following signals of reduced regulatory pressure from Beijing.
